name: D&D Veterans
description: A group for experienced players looking for high-level D&D campaigns. We focus on roleplay and deep storytelling.

name: Casual One-Shots
description: Looking for casual players to join one-shot D&D adventures. Perfect for beginners!

name: Pathfinder Society
description: We play Pathfinder Society adventures weekly. Join our waitlist for an open slot!

name: Shadowrun Heist Crew
description: Join our cyberpunk crew for a Shadowrun campaign full of intrigue, hacking, and tactical combat.

name: Call of Cthulhu Investigators
description: A psychological horror-driven Call of Cthulhu campaign with deep mysteries and mind-bending twists.

name: Beginner's GURPS Group
description: New to GURPS? This is a friendly group for learning the system with custom-built scenarios.

name: Star Wars: Edge of the Empire
description: A spacefaring adventure in the Star Wars universe. Smugglers, bounty hunters, and rebels welcome!
